    E

    ERROR - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.lexing.TokenType

    ExecutionSnapshot - Record Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime
    Immutable snapshot of an IExecutionContext at a specific point in time.

    Creates an instance of a ExecutionSnapshot record class.
    ExistingInstructionException - Exception Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.error
    Thrown when attempting to register an instruction that already exists in the instruction set.
